title: Rock bolt with meshing adapter
abstract: A rock bolt and meshing assembly for installation of meshing sheet against a surface of rock strata. The rock bolt comprises an adapter having a first portion connectable to a trailing end of an elongate shaft of the rock bolt and an elongate extension configured to receive and mount a meshing plate to overlay a second section of meshing sheet against an already laid first section of meshing sheet.
claims: Claims Claims 1. A rock bolt (10) for installation within a bore (12) formed in rock strata (13) comprising: an elongate shaft (14) having a leading end for installation into the bore (12) and a trailing end to project from an open end of the bore (12); characterised by: an adapter (30) having a first portion (33) connectable to the trailing end of the elongate shaft (14) and an extension (35) extending axially from the first portion and configured to receive and mount a meshing plate (38) to bear against and urge a meshing sheet (27) into contact with a surface (26) of the rock strata (13). 2. The rock bolt as claimed in claim 1 wherein the extension (35) comprises a second portion connectable with a connecting region of the meshing plate (38). 3. The rock bolt as claimed in claim 2 wherein the second portion comprises threads provided at the extension (35). 4. A rock bolt according to claim 3, the rock bolt (10) having a nut (16) applied to the threaded end and the nut (16) having a threaded outside surface and the adapter (30) being threadably connected to the nut (16) via the first portion (33). 5. A rock bolt according to any preceding claim wherein the first portion (33) comprises a socket with an internal thread (32) for threaded connection to the trailing end of the rock bolt (10). 6. A rock bolt according to claim 5 wherein the extension (35) comprises a threaded bar extending from the socket. 7. A rock bolt according to claim 6 wherein the threaded bar is of smaller outside diameter than an outside diameter of the socket. 8. A rock bolt according to any preceding claim wherein the adapter (30) comprises a nut (34) having a polygonal, square or hexagonal outside surface for the purpose of rotating the adapter (30) by a wrench, spanner or other driving device. 9. A rock bolt according to claim 8 wherein the nut (34) is provided at an outside surface of the socket. 10. A rock bolt according to claim 8, wherein the nut (34) is provide at an outside surface of the extension (35). 11. A rock bolt according to claim 9 or 10 wherein the nut (34) is provided axially between the socket and the extension (35). 12. A rock bolt according to any preceding claim wherein the extension (35) comprises a threaded section extending over a first section and an unthreaded section (48) adjacent a leading or free end of the extension (35). 13. A meshing assembly for installation of meshing sheet against a surface (26) of rock strata (13) comprising: a rock bolt (10) as claimed in any preceding claim; a first section (25) of meshing positionable against the surface (26) of the rock strata (13); a rock plate (21) connectable to the trailing end of the rock bolt (10) to bear against and urge the first section (25) into contact with the surface (26) of the rock strata (13); a second section (27) of meshing positionable against the surface (26) of the rock strata (13) and overlapping the first section (25); and a meshing plate (38) connectable to the extension (35) and configured to bear against and urge the second section (27) into contact with the surface (26) of the rock strata (13). 14. The assembly as claimed in claim 13 wherein the meshing plate (38) comprises a collar (47) having a through opening (49), the extension (35) dimensioned to pass through the opening (49) to enable the meshing plate (38) to be received by and mounted on the adapter (30). 15. The assembly as claimed in claim 14 wherein the meshing plate (38) comprises a skirt or cup (46) extending from the collar (47) and dimensioned to sit over and about the trailing end of the rock bolt (10).
